title: micrococca wightii var. hirsuta
intro: Micrococca wightii var. hirsuta, also known as the Kutki plant, is an herbaceous plant belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and hepatoprotective effects. The health benefits of Micrococca wightii var. hirsuta include the potential to improve liver function, reduce inflammation, and support the digestive system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in powder or extract form, and can be consumed as a supplement or used in traditional Ayurvedic remedies.
